commands.review_summary:
The branch remaps Codex-harness OpenAI status usage to the OpenAI Codex quota provider, scopes CLI status usage to the scanned config/default agent auth store, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows Codex-harness OpenAI status resolves auth as openai-codex but usage from openai, while docs say status usage should print provider usage windows and the registry only has openai-codex.
